action_mappings.release_evidence_attachment: release evidence attachment {} from alert case {}

action_mappings.release_watchlist_item_from_case: release watchlist item {} from alert case {}

action_mappings.release_customer_attribute_from_case: release customer attribute {} from alert case {}

action_mappings.release_sanctions_check_from_case: release sanctions check resource {} from alert case {}

action_mappings.assign_specialist_with_report_and_flags: assign specialist {} to alert case {} with sanctions check resource {} and external report {}
action_mappings.clear_interim_escalation_flags: clear interim escalation flags for alert case {} using watchlist item {} and customer attribute {}

action_mappings.request_recheck_with_sme: request recheck with subject matter expert {} for alert case {}
action_mappings.escalate_recheck_to_approver: escalate recheck of alert case {} to approver {}

action_mappings.record_case_recheck_notification: record recheck notification for alert case {} with evidence attachment {} and document checklist {}
action_mappings.finalize_case_with_alias_type_a: finalize alert case {} with alias type A
action_mappings.finalize_case_with_approver_confirmation: finalize alert case {} with approver confirmation from approver {}
action_mappings.finalize_case_with_recheck_confirmation: finalize alert case {} with recheck confirmation

action_mappings_indef.enter_secondary_review_queue: enter an alert case {} into the secondary review queue
action_mappings_indef.assign_analyst_to_case: assign an analyst {} to an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_analyst_from_case: release an analyst {} from an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.lock_evidence_attachment: lock an evidence attachment {} to an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_evidence_attachment: release an evidence attachment {} from an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_escalation_eligibility_on_evidence: mark escalation eligibility on an evidence attachment {} for an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.escalate_to_sme_and_preflag: escalate an alert case {} to a subject matter expert {} and pre-flag for secondary review
action_mappings_indef.sme_perform_review_and_set_completion: perform review on an alert case {} using an evidence attachment {} and a document checklist {} and set completion flag
action_mappings_indef.record_sme_review_with_approver_input: record SME review for an alert case {} with input from an approver {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_watchlist_item_for_case: reserve a watchlist item {} for an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_watchlist_item_from_case: release a watchlist item {} from an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_customer_attribute_for_case: reserve a customer attribute {} for an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_customer_attribute_from_case: release a customer attribute {} from an alert case {}

action_mappings_indef.release_sanctions_check_from_case: release a sanctions check resource {} from an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_third_party_verification_for_cas: reserve a third party verification {} for an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_third_party_verification_from_ca: release a third party verification {} from an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_specialist_to_case: assign a specialist {} to an alert case {} with a watchlist item {} and a customer attribute {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_specialist_with_report_and_flags: assign a specialist {} to an alert case {} with a sanctions check resource {} and an external report {}

action_mappings_indef.record_secondary_review_decision_by_revi: record secondary review decision for an alert case {} by a review manager {} using a sanctions check resource {} and a third party verification {}

action_mappings_indef.request_recheck_for_evidence: request recheck for evidence in an alert case {} with an evidence attachment {}
action_mappings_indef.request_recheck_with_sme: request recheck with a subject matter expert {} for an alert case {}
action_mappings_indef.escalate_recheck_to_approver: escalate recheck of an alert case {} to an approver {}

predicate_mappings.case_in_secondary_review_queue: {} is in the secondary review queue
predicate_mappings.case_has_assigned_analyst: the case {} has an assigned analyst
predicate_mappings.sme_escalation_flag: the sme escalation flag is set for {}
predicate_mappings.sme_review_completed_flag: the sme review completed flag is set for {}
predicate_mappings.watchlist_item_reserved_for_case: {} is reserved for {} on the watchlist
predicate_mappings.customer_attribute_reserved_for_case: {} is reserved for {} for the customer
predicate_mappings.sanctions_check_reserved_for_case: {} is reserved for sanctions check for {}
predicate_mappings.third_party_verification_reserved_for_ca: {} is reserved for third party verification for {}
predicate_mappings.specialist_assignment_confirmed_flag: the specialist assignment for the case {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.secondary_review_authorized_flag: the secondary review for the case {} is authorized
predicate_mappings.recheck_requested_flag: a recheck is requested for the case {}
predicate_mappings.preflag_for_secondary_review: the case {} is pre-flagged for secondary review
predicate_mappings.final_approval_flag: the case {} has a final approval flag
predicate_mappings.approver_approval_recorded_for_case: {} has recorded approval for the case {}
predicate_mappings.external_reporting_flag: the external reporting flag is set for {}
predicate_mappings.customer_attribute_available: {} is available as a customer attribute
predicate_mappings.subject_matter_expert_available: {} is available as a subject matter expert
predicate_mappings.case_eligible_for_specialist: {} is eligible for the specialist queue {}
predicate_mappings.case_eligible_for_watchlist_item: {} is eligible for the watchlist item {}
predicate_mappings.case_eligible_for_attribute_check: {} is eligible for the attribute check {}
predicate_mappings.case_eligible_for_sanctions_check: {} is eligible for the sanctions check {}
predicate_mappings.case_eligible_for_external_report: {} is eligible for the external report {}
predicate_mappings.case_eligible_for_third_party_verificati: {} is eligible for the third-party verification {}
predicate_mappings.interim_escalation_flag: the interim escalation flag is set for {}

enter_secondary_review_queue.description: enter an alert case A into the secondary review queue
preconditions: I can only enter an alert case A into the secondary review queue if it is not the case that A is in the secondary review queue and it is not the case that the case A is fully approved
effects: Once I enter an alert case A into the secondary review queue, it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue

assign_analyst_to_case.description: assign an analyst B to an alert case A
preconditions: I can only assign an analyst B to an alert case A if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
I can only assign an analyst B to an alert case A if it is not the case that the case A has an assigned analyst
effects: Once I assign an analyst B to an alert case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the case A and the case A has an assigned analyst
Once I assign an analyst B to an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_analyst_from_case.description: release an analyst B from an alert case A
preconditions: I can only release an analyst B from an alert case A if it is the case that B is assigned to the case A

I can only release an analyst B from an alert case A if it is not the case that the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed and it is not the case that the secondary review for the case A is authorized
effects: Once I release an analyst B from an alert case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release an analyst B from an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the case A and it is not the case anymore that the case A has an assigned analyst and it is not the case anymore that the sme escalation flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that the sme review completed flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that the case A is pre flagged for secondary review and it is not the case anymore that the case A has a final approval flag and it is not the case anymore that the interim escalation flag is set for A

lock_evidence_attachment.description: lock an evidence attachment B to an alert case A
preconditions: I can only lock an evidence attachment B to an alert case A if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and B is available for evidence attachment
effects: Once I lock an evidence attachment B to an alert case A, it is the case that B is attached to the case A
Once I lock an evidence attachment B to an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for evidence attachment

release_evidence_attachment.description: release an evidence attachment B from an alert case A
preconditions: I can only release an evidence attachment B from an alert case A if it is the case that B is attached to the case A
effects: Once I release an evidence attachment B from an alert case A, it is the case that B is available for evidence attachment
Once I release an evidence attachment B from an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is attached to the case A

mark_escalation_eligibility_on_evidence.description: mark escalation eligibility on an evidence attachment B for an alert case A
preconditions: I can only mark escalation eligibility on an evidence attachment B for an alert case A if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and the case A has an assigned analyst and B is attached to the case A
I can only mark escalation eligibility on an evidence attachment B for an alert case A if it is not the case that the sme escalation flag is set for A
effects: Once I mark escalation eligibility on an evidence attachment B for an alert case A, it is the case that the sme escalation flag is set for A

escalate_to_sme_and_preflag.description: escalate an alert case A to a subject matter expert B and pre flag for secondary review
preconditions: I can only escalate an alert case A to a subject matter expert B and pre flag for secondary review if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and the case A has an assigned analyst and B is available as a subject matter expert
I can only escalate an alert case A to a subject matter expert B and pre flag for secondary review if it is not the case that the sme escalation flag is set for A
effects: Once I escalate an alert case A to a subject matter expert B and pre flag for secondary review, it is the case that the sme escalation flag is set for A and the case A is pre flagged for secondary review
Once I escalate an alert case A to a subject matter expert B and pre flag for secondary review, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a subject matter expert

sme_perform_review_and_set_completion.description: perform review on an alert case A using an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C and set completion flag
preconditions: I can only perform review on an alert case A using an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C and set completion flag if it is the case that the sme escalation flag is set for A and the case A has an assigned analyst and B is attached to the case A and C is available
I can only perform review on an alert case A using an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C and set completion flag if it is not the case that the sme review completed flag is set for A
effects: Once I perform review on an alert case A using an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C and set completion flag, it is the case that the sme review completed flag is set for A

Once I perform review on an alert case A using an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C and set completion flag, it is not the case anymore that the case A is pre flagged for secondary review

record_sme_review_with_approver_input.description: record SME review for an alert case A with input from an approver B
preconditions: I can only record SME review for an alert case A with input from an approver B if it is the case that the case A has an assigned analyst and B has recorded approval for the case A
I can only record SME review for an alert case A with input from an approver B if it is not the case that the sme review completed flag is set for A
effects: Once I record SME review for an alert case A with input from an approver B, it is the case that the sme review completed flag is set for A
Once I record SME review for an alert case A with input from an approver B, it is not the case anymore that the case A is pre flagged for secondary review

reserve_watchlist_item_for_case.description: reserve a watchlist item B for an alert case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a watchlist item B for an alert case A if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and B is available on the watchlist and A is eligible for the watchlist item B
effects: Once I reserve a watchlist item B for an alert case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A on the watchlist
Once I reserve a watchlist item B for an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available on the watchlist

release_watchlist_item_from_case.description: release a watchlist item B from an alert case A
preconditions: I can only release a watchlist item B from an alert case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A on the watchlist
effects: Once I release a watchlist item B from an alert case A, it is the case that B is available on the watchlist
Once I release a watchlist item B from an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A on the watchlist

reserve_customer_attribute_for_case.description: reserve a customer attribute B for an alert case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a customer attribute B for an alert case A if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and B is available as a customer attribute and A is eligible for the attribute check B
effects: Once I reserve a customer attribute B for an alert case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A for the customer
Once I reserve a customer attribute B for an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a customer attribute

release_customer_attribute_from_case.description: release a customer attribute B from an alert case A
preconditions: I can only release a customer attribute B from an alert case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A for the customer
effects: Once I release a customer attribute B from an alert case A, it is the case that B is available as a customer attribute
Once I release a customer attribute B from an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A for the customer

reserve_sanctions_check_for_case.description: reserve a sanctions check resource B for an alert case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a sanctions check resource B for an alert case A if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and B is available for sanctions check and A is eligible for the sanctions check B
effects: Once I reserve a sanctions check resource B for an alert case A, it is the case that B is reserved for sanctions check for A
Once I reserve a sanctions check resource B for an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for sanctions check

release_sanctions_check_from_case.description: release a sanctions check resource B from an alert case A
preconditions: I can only release a sanctions check resource B from an alert case A if it is the case that B is reserved for sanctions check for A
effects: Once I release a sanctions check resource B from an alert case A, it is the case that B is available for sanctions check
Once I release a sanctions check resource B from an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for sanctions check for A

reserve_third_party_verification_for_cas.description: reserve a third party verification B for an alert case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a third party verification B for an alert case A if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and B is available and A is eligible for the third party verification B
effects: Once I reserve a third party verification B for an alert case A, it is the case that B is reserved for third party verification for A
Once I reserve a third party verification B for an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_third_party_verification_from_ca.description: release a third party verification B from an alert case A
preconditions: I can only release a third party verification B from an alert case A if it is the case that B is reserved for third party verification for A
effects: Once I release a third party verification B from an alert case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a third party verification B from an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for third party verification for A

assign_specialist_to_case.description: assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a watchlist item C and a customer attribute D
preconditions: I can only assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a watchlist item C and a customer attribute D if it is the case that the case A has an assigned analyst and C is reserved for A on the watchlist and D is reserved for A for the customer and a specialist is available in B and A is eligible for the specialist queue B
I can only assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a watchlist item C and a customer attribute D if it is not the case that the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed
effects: Once I assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a watchlist item C and a customer attribute D, it is the case that B is assigned to the case A and the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed
Once I assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a watchlist item C and a customer attribute D, it is not the case anymore that a specialist is available in B

assign_specialist_with_report_and_flags.description: assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a sanctions check resource C and an external report D
preconditions: I can only assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a sanctions check resource C and an external report D if it is the case that the case A has an assigned analyst and C is reserved for sanctions check for A and D is available and a specialist is available in B and A is eligible for the specialist queue B and A is eligible for the external report D
I can only assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a sanctions check resource C and an external report D if it is not the case that the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed
effects: Once I assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a sanctions check resource C and an external report D, it is the case that B is assigned to the case A and the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed and the interim escalation flag is set for A and the case A is pre flagged for secondary review

Once I assign a specialist B to an alert case A with a sanctions check resource C and an external report D, it is not the case anymore that a specialist is available in B and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_interim_escalation_flags.description: clear interim escalation flags for an alert case A using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C
preconditions: I can only clear interim escalation flags for an alert case A using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C if it is the case that the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed and the interim escalation flag is set for A and B is reserved for A on the watchlist and C is reserved for A for the customer
effects: Once I clear interim escalation flags for an alert case A using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C, it is not the case anymore that the interim escalation flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that the case A is pre flagged for secondary review

record_secondary_review_decision_by_comp.description: record secondary review decision for an alert case A by a compliance officer D using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C
preconditions: I can only record secondary review decision for an alert case A by a compliance officer D using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C if it is the case that the sme review completed flag is set for A and the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed and B is reserved for A on the watchlist and C is reserved for A for the customer and D is linked to the case A

I can only record secondary review decision for an alert case A by a compliance officer D using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C if it is not the case that the case A is pre flagged for secondary review and it is not the case that the secondary review for the case A is authorized
effects: Once I record secondary review decision for an alert case A by a compliance officer D using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C, it is the case that the secondary review for the case A is authorized

record_secondary_review_decision_by_revi.description: record secondary review decision for an alert case A by a review manager D using a sanctions check resource B and a third party verification C
preconditions: I can only record secondary review decision for an alert case A by a review manager D using a sanctions check resource B and a third party verification C if it is the case that the sme review completed flag is set for A and the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed and B is reserved for sanctions check for A and C is reserved for third party verification for A and D is linked to the case A

I can only record secondary review decision for an alert case A by a review manager D using a sanctions check resource B and a third party verification C if it is not the case that the secondary review for the case A is authorized
effects: Once I record secondary review decision for an alert case A by a review manager D using a sanctions check resource B and a third party verification C, it is the case that the secondary review for the case A is authorized and the case A is pre flagged for secondary review

finalize_secondary_review_decision_and_l.description: finalize secondary review decision and lock for an alert case A using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C
preconditions: I can only finalize secondary review decision and lock for an alert case A using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C if it is the case that the secondary review for the case A is authorized and the case A is pre flagged for secondary review and B is reserved for A on the watchlist and C is reserved for A for the customer
effects: Once I finalize secondary review decision and lock for an alert case A using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C, it is the case that the case A has a final approval flag

Once I finalize secondary review decision and lock for an alert case A using a watchlist item B and a customer attribute C, it is not the case anymore that the case A is pre flagged for secondary review and it is not the case anymore that the sme review completed flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that the interim escalation flag is set for A

trigger_recheck_and_lock_evidence.description: trigger recheck and lock evidence for an alert case A with an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C
preconditions: I can only trigger recheck and lock evidence for an alert case A with an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C if it is the case that the case A has a final approval flag and the secondary review for the case A is authorized and the case A has an assigned analyst and B is attached to the case A and C is available
I can only trigger recheck and lock evidence for an alert case A with an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C if it is not the case that the sme review completed flag is set for A
effects: Once I trigger recheck and lock evidence for an alert case A with an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C, it is the case that the sme review completed flag is set for A

request_recheck_for_evidence.description: request recheck for evidence in an alert case A with an evidence attachment B
preconditions: I can only request recheck for evidence in an alert case A with an evidence attachment B if it is the case that the secondary review for the case A is authorized and the sme review completed flag is set for A and B is attached to the case A

I can only request recheck for evidence in an alert case A with an evidence attachment B if it is not the case that the case A is pre flagged for secondary review and it is not the case that a recheck is requested for the case A
effects: Once I request recheck for evidence in an alert case A with an evidence attachment B, it is the case that a recheck is requested for the case A

request_recheck_with_sme.description: request recheck with a subject matter expert B for an alert case A
preconditions: I can only request recheck with a subject matter expert B for an alert case A if it is the case that the secondary review for the case A is authorized and the sme review completed flag is set for A and B is available as a subject matter expert

I can only request recheck with a subject matter expert B for an alert case A if it is not the case that the case A is pre flagged for secondary review and it is not the case that a recheck is requested for the case A
effects: Once I request recheck with a subject matter expert B for an alert case A, it is the case that a recheck is requested for the case A
Once I request recheck with a subject matter expert B for an alert case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a subject matter expert

escalate_recheck_to_approver.description: escalate recheck of an alert case A to an approver B
preconditions: I can only escalate recheck of an alert case A to an approver B if it is the case that a recheck is requested for the case A and B is available as an approver and B is eligible to approve A
effects: Once I escalate recheck of an alert case A to an approver B, it is the case that B is assigned to the case A
Once I escalate recheck of an alert case A to an approver B, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an approver

approver_record_final_approval_on_case_r.description: record final approval on a case record A by an approver C for a case alias B
preconditions: I can only record final approval on a case record A by an approver C for a case alias B if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and A has a case record and C is linked to the case A and C is assigned to the case B
I can only record final approval on a case record A by an approver C for a case alias B if it is not the case that C has recorded approval for the case A
effects: Once I record final approval on a case record A by an approver C for a case alias B, it is the case that C has recorded approval for the case A

record_case_recheck_notification.description: record recheck notification for an alert case A with an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C
preconditions: I can only record recheck notification for an alert case A with an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C if it is the case that A is in the secondary review queue and A has a case record and the sme review completed flag is set for A and a recheck is requested for the case A and B is attached to the case A and C is available
I can only record recheck notification for an alert case A with an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C if it is not the case that the external reporting flag is set for A
effects: Once I record recheck notification for an alert case A with an evidence attachment B and a document checklist C, it is the case that the external reporting flag is set for A

finalize_case_with_alias_type_a.description: finalize an alert case A with alias type A
preconditions: I can only finalize an alert case A with alias type A if it is the case that A has a case alias and A is in the secondary review queue and the case A has an assigned analyst and the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed and the secondary review for the case A is authorized and a recheck is requested for the case A and the sme review completed flag is set for A
I can only finalize an alert case A with alias type A if it is not the case that the case A is fully approved
effects: Once I finalize an alert case A with alias type A, it is the case that the case A is fully approved

finalize_case_with_approver_confirmation.description: finalize an alert case A with approver confirmation from an approver B
preconditions: I can only finalize an alert case A with approver confirmation from an approver B if it is the case that A has a case record and A is in the secondary review queue and the case A has an assigned analyst and the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed and the secondary review for the case A is authorized and a recheck is requested for the case A and the sme review completed flag is set for A and B has recorded approval for the case A
I can only finalize an alert case A with approver confirmation from an approver B if it is not the case that the case A is fully approved
effects: Once I finalize an alert case A with approver confirmation from an approver B, it is the case that the case A is fully approved

finalize_case_with_recheck_confirmation.description: finalize an alert case A with recheck confirmation
preconditions: I can only finalize an alert case A with recheck confirmation if it is the case that A has a case record and A is in the secondary review queue and the case A has an assigned analyst and the specialist assignment for the case A is confirmed and the secondary review for the case A is authorized and a recheck is requested for the case A and the sme review completed flag is set for A and the external reporting flag is set for A
I can only finalize an alert case A with recheck confirmation if it is not the case that the case A is fully approved
effects: Once I finalize an alert case A with recheck confirmation, it is the case that the case A is fully approved

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a alert case or a analyst or a specialist or a customer attribute or a watchlist item or a sanctions check resource or a evidence attachment or a subject matter expert or a approver or a document checklist or a external report or a third party verification or a authority role is also a object
Everything that is a compliance officer or a review manager is also a authority role
Everything that is a case alias or a case record is also a alert case
